short: NVIDIA's deep-learning inference optimizer and runtime for GPUs.
definition: TensorRT is NVIDIA's SDK for high-performance deep-learning inference. It takes a trained model and compiles it into an optimized runtime engine by fusing layers, selecting the fastest kernels for the target GPU, and applying precision calibration (FP16, INT8, FP8). TensorRT-LLM extends it specifically for transformer/LLM workloads.
